judge_reason: Description A claims a physical description of a light-blue translucent paper with a torn edge, while Description B states there are no embedded photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts, directly contradicting the implied visual content of A.
original_image_tags: The document is a carbon copy or similar on thin, translucent, light-blue/gray paper, showing signs of age and wear, including a jagged torn edge on the right side.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned typewritten Office Memorandum page headed “UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT,” addressed to Director, FBI from SAC, Phoenix, dated 4/18/50, with subject “WILLIAM ALBERT RHODES INFORMATION CONCERNING FLYING DISCS,” and several faint handwritten notations and stamps near the bottom including “RECEIVED - 49,” “INDEXED - 49,” and red number “225.”*
